purpose: Local-first source inventory for the first KosmoReferences and KosmoAsset pilots.

source_roots_checked.notes: Primary local repo with archive, media, model, source registry and book-ingestion smoke data.
OneDrive mirror contains project/workflow docs and repo context; no large book or ETH/HSLU lecture library found in this pass.
Live/local OneDrive path is about 515 MB; contains design/workflow docs, not the expected large architecture reference library.
Archive directory exists; no targeted source package selected yet.

candidate_shortlist.title: Kapelle Sogn Benedetg
candidate_shortlist.reason: Swiss timber-shingle sacred building; explicitly named in local schema notes.

candidate_shortlist.title: Schulhaus Paspels
candidate_shortlist.reason: Swiss school/village reference; explicitly named in local schema notes, but timber role must be source-checked.

candidate_shortlist.title: Kloster St. Gallen
candidate_shortlist.reason: Existing Swiss historical local entry with timber tags, source candidates and generated plan/model packages; useful interim reference, but not a dedicated Holzbau pilot.

registered_source_tools.name: Lignumdata
registered_source_tools.use_for: Swiss timber structure and material tags.

registered_source_tools.name: Material-Archiv
registered_source_tools.use_for: Material taxonomy and educational classification, not media republication.

open_findings: The expected huge OneDrive architecture book / ETH / HSLU lecture library was not visible in the checked mounted paths.
The Swiss timber pilot should not be promoted until at least one concrete local source package is found or a live/public source pack is explicitly approved.
Kloster St. Gallen can serve as an interim historical Swiss timber-relevant local entry, but it should not be labelled as the dedicated Holzbau pilot.
next_actions: Ask Claude/KosmoOverseer to point Codex at the real synced book/lecture root if it exists outside the checked paths.
Run local research packages for Villa Savoye, Ingenbohl and Swiss timber candidates.
Keep public display blocked for copyrighted book scans, office images, plan reproductions and generated assets until rights gates pass.
